name: Path.LowLevel.Parser
comment:
Parse SVG path syntax into an elm value

@docs parse

values.name: parse
values.comment:
Parse svg path syntax into a list of subpaths.

    parse "m10,20 A25,25 -30 0,1 50,-25" -->
        Ok
            [ { moveto = MoveTo Relative ( 10, 20 )
              , drawtos =
                    [ EllipticalArc Absolute
                        { radii = ( 25, 25 )
                        , xAxisRotate = -30
                        , arcFlag = SmallestArc
                        , direction = CounterClockwise
                        , target = ( 50, -25 )
                        }
                    ]
              }
            ]

name: Path.LowLevel

unions.name: MoveTo
unions.comment: MoveTo instructions move the cursor, but don't draw anything.

aliases.name: Coordinate
aliases.comment: Represent a point in 2D space with a tuple of floats

aliases.name: EllipticalArcArgument
aliases.type: { radii : ( Float, Float ), xAxisRotate : Float, arcFlag : ArcFlag, direction : Direction, target : Coordinate }

aliases.name: SubPath
aliases.comment: A subpath is a `MoveTo` followed by a list of `DrawTo`s

values.name: decodeFlags
values.comment: Try to decode two ints into flag values. Inverse of `encodeFlags`.

values.name: element
values.comment:
Given some attributes and a list of subpaths, create an Svg path element.

The subpaths will be converted to a string and added as the `d` attribute on the element
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> List SubPath -> Svg msg

values.name: encodeFlags
values.comment:
Turn the flags into numbers

    case arcFlag of
        LargestArc -> 1
        SmallestArc -> 0

    case direction of
        Clockwise -> 0
        CounterClockwise -> 1

values.name: toString
values.comment:
Convert a list of subpaths to svg path syntax

    let
        myPath =
            [ { moveto = MoveTo Relative ( 10, 20 )
              , drawtos =
                    [ EllipticalArc Absolute
                        { radii = ( 25, 25 )
                        , xAxisRotate = -30
                        , arcFlag = SmallestArc
                        , direction = CounterClockwise
                        , target = ( 50, -25 )
                        }
                    ]
              }
            ]
    in
        toString myPath --> "m10,20 A25,25 -30 0,1 50,-25"
